race.comment: ARIZONA SKY (6) is building into the campaign nicely, beaten 3.7L after sitting closer in the run last time out on the Scarpside circuit here. Pike now hops on board third-up and the blinkers go on for the first time. Needs a touch of luck from the wide draw but looks a big improver. LORD MOMO (1) resumed in good order over the 1300m trip on the Scarpside here and should be suited by the rise in trip second-up. Fiore hops on board now and he's shown enough in his first two outings to suggest he'll make the grade. VALID POINT (3) is building nicely this campaign and won't be far away. BIG MARE (14) can improve out in trip today.
